heading: Definitions
label: 8702 Definitions

children.heading: .—Environs
children.label: 1 .—Environs
children.text: The term “environs” means the territory surrounding the District of Columbia included in the National Capital region.

children.heading: .—National capital
children.label: 2 .—National capital
children.text: The term “National Capital” means the District of Columbia and territory the Federal Government owns in the environs.

children.label: B
children.text: Montgomery and Prince Georges Counties in Maryland;

children.label: C
children.text: Arlington, Fairfax, Loudoun, and Prince William Counties in Virginia; and

children.label: D
children.text: all cities in Maryland or Virginia in the geographic area bounded by the outer boundaries of the combined area of the counties listed in subparagraphs (B) and (C).

children.heading: .—Planning agency
children.label: 4 .—Planning agency
children.text: The term “planning agency” means any city, county, bi-county, part-county, or regional planning agency authorized under state and local laws to make and adopt comprehensive plans.
